title: Toasty Spanish Malai Croquetas
description: A malty, cheese-pull Spanish dish featuring malai, perfect for a brunch mood, made into crispy croquetas, halal-friendly and delicious.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the powdered malai, grated cheese, and flour.
Add the melted butter, egg, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into small balls and then flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Coat each disk in the panko breadcrumbs, pressing the crumbs onto the cheese mixture to help them stick.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and fry the croquetas until they are golden brown on both sides.
Transfer the fried croquetas to a baking sheet and bake in the oven for 10 minutes.
Remove the croquetas from the oven and let them cool on a paper towel-lined plate for a few minutes.
Serve the croquetas hot and enjoy.
